_meta.purpose: Sunset Surf School — tenant deploy config skeleton. Follows config/clients/_deploy-config.template.json. NOT live; deployment.enabled=false. All seed prices carry pricing_status=unverified_seed and must be owner-verified before live use. See docs/sunset/SUNSET-CONFIG-SKELETON-NOTES.md.
_meta._vertical_note: Combined surf school + rental shop vertical with a partner-hotel accommodation workflow. The engine vertical seam (catalog.offerings[].inventory_model) distinguishes rentals (unlimited), lessons (capacity_limited), and accommodation (partner_confirmed) within a single tenant config.
_meta._languages_note: English primary for MVP. Spanish expected from local customers; extend as needed.

deployment._whatsapp_note: Set to the Sunset WABA phone-number ID at deploy time. Used by the channel adapter for tenant_id resolution.
deployment._email_note: Email is fast-follow (not MVP). Populate when email ingress is wired.
deployment._staff_api_note: Every Staff-API call must carry tenant_id=sunset. Engine reads this field; never hardcode in code.
deployment._stripe_note: Sunset gets its own Stripe context (keys in secret file). Never shares Wolfhouse Stripe.
deployment.notes: Config skeleton only. Fill <FILL> fields, have owner verify pricing_status, and set enabled=true only after full deploy checklist in docs/DEPLOYMENT-CONFIG.md.

secrets._note: Real numbers/credentials live in config/clients/sunset.secrets.json (gitignored). Reference by 'secret:<key>'. See config/clients/sunset.secrets.example.json for the required keys.

persona.role: front-desk booking and inquiry assistant for Sunset Surf School
persona.voice_summary: Warm, helpful, direct. Knows surf rentals, lessons, and packages. One clear question at a time on WhatsApp; more structured on email.
persona._persona_note: No separate Cami-equivalent voice module for MVP. Luna speaks warmly in the Sunset brand. A messaging playbook (sunset.messaging.json) can be added later to formalise tone and templates.

whatsapp._enabled_note: Set to true at deploy time once WABA credentials are in place and deployment.whatsapp_phone_number_id is filled.

email._note: Email ingress is net-new plumbing; implement after WhatsApp MVP is stable. Same brain, same truth rules; only output formatting differs.

pricing_policy._note: engine_default mechanism. Every priced item carries pricing_status. unverified_seed = transcribed from public site, not owner-confirmed; may not be used for any quote to a real guest. provisional = owner has reviewed; dry-run/shadow only. confirmed = owner-verified; required for live autonomous charge.

catalog._note: Sunset multi-offering catalog. Each offering carries its own inventory_model (Skipper decision: Option A — single config, per-offering inventory_model). Engine routes each offering to the matching InventoryProvider. Prices are unverified_seed — see pricing_policy.
catalog._offering_type_note: Sunset spans rentals + lessons + partner_accommodation. inventory_model is per-offering, not per-tenant.

rentals._note: Surfboard / wetsuit / board+suit / SUP. inventory_model=unlimited for MVP: Luna quotes configured prices without an availability check. Revisit when real stock limits are needed.

sup_rental.label: SUP (stand-up paddleboard) rental
sup_rental._note: 2-day, 5-day, 7-day SUP prices not listed on public site; owner must confirm before offering.

lessons._note: Group / private / kids lessons. inventory_model=capacity_limited: Luna must check Staff-API slot capacity before confirming a seat. If capacity is unknown or unavailable, Luna collects the request and staff schedule manually.
lessons.materials_included_note: Board, wax, leash, wetsuit included per public site — owner must confirm before Luna states as policy.
lessons._insurance_note: Public site states prices include insurance/civil liability. Owner must confirm before Luna states this to guests.

scheduling._note: Slot times are seed data from the public site. Confirm with owner before Luna states these as the live schedule.

adult_adolescent_group._note: Public site states 'over 12'. Owner must confirm exact cutoff and group-size constraints.

childrens_surfpark._note: Public site says 'roughly ages 6-11'; minimum depends on group size and child ability. Owner must confirm before Luna quotes eligibility.

prices_eur._note: Kids pricing not separately listed on public site; owner must confirm before Luna quotes.
Private lesson price not listed on public site; owner must provide.

large_group_lesson.label: Large group lesson

prices_eur._note: Large group pricing and capacity limits not listed on public site; owner must provide.

large_group_lesson._handoff_note: Groups beyond configured max should hand off — threshold unknown until owner sets it.

accommodation._note: Surf + accommodation packages via a nearby partner hotel. inventory_model=partner_confirmed: Luna never promises a room or final price without Staff-API or partner-hotel confirmation. For MVP this is a request-then-confirm workflow.
accommodation._availability_note: Unless Staff API explicitly confirms hotel availability, Luna treats accommodation as a request needing partner/hotel confirmation. Never promise a room, price, or date.

prices_eur._note: Accommodation package prices not on public site; owner and partner hotel must supply before Luna can quote.

service_addons._note: Compatibility block for existing Luna Front Desk engine readers. Rich Sunset lesson catalog remains under catalog.lessons; current engine reads lesson_scheduling from service_addons.lesson_scheduling.

notes: Sunset lessons are capacity-limited by date/time.
When enabled, availability must come from Staff API lesson slots, not model memory.
This block is present for compatibility with existing engine readers.

payment._note: Reused engine spine. Values owner_required. Bot may create payment links only after the required fields are collected and pricing_status=confirmed. Links come from the Staff API / payment tool only — never constructed by Luna.
payment._payment_link_options_note: Deposit vs full TBD by owner; default to full until deposit rule is confirmed.

confirmation._arrive_note: For lessons, confirm meeting point and the 20-min-early rule when owner verifies.

cancellation._bad_weather_note: For surf schools, bad-weather/flat-day lesson refund is common. Owner must specify; until confirmed Luna hands off.

handoff._handoff_channel_note: Primary handoff target is staff WhatsApp. Email handoff can be added when email channel is live.
handoff.handoff_safe_reply: Let me connect you with our team — they'll be with you shortly.
handoff._always_handoff_note: Engine base list + Sunset-specific additions (minor consent, accommodation unconfirmed, age eligibility).

llm_safety._note: engine_default. Stated explicitly here so Sunset has a local assertion; values are non-negotiable.

safety_rules._note: Explicit Sunset assertions of the inherited engine safety contract (docs/LUNA-GUEST-BEHAVIOR-SPEC.md). Code that reads this config must enforce these; they are NOT suggestions.
safety_rules._no_invented_prices_note: Luna must never quote a price that did not come from this config at pricing_status=confirmed. Seed prices (unverified_seed) are blocked for live quotes.
safety_rules._no_invented_availability_note: Lesson/accommodation availability must come from Staff-API capacity check or partner confirmation. Rental availability is unlimited for MVP (no check needed), but prices still come from config.
safety_rules._no_invented_payment_links_note: Payment links are created by the Staff-API / payment tool and relayed verbatim. Luna never constructs or guesses a URL.
safety_rules._confirmation_note: A booking/order is not confirmed until Stripe webhook truth. Never say 'paid', 'confirmed', or 'reserved' before that signal.
safety_rules._tenant_isolation_note: Sunset Luna must never reference Wolfhouse packages, prices, rooms, Somo house, Cami, or any Wolfhouse-tenant facts.
safety_rules._minor_note: Children's lessons involve minors. Guardian consent must be confirmed; extra privacy obligations apply.

staff_queries._note: Read-only ops Q&A, staff-channel only. Safe intents for a surf school/rental context.

owner_required_before_go_live: Verify and confirm all prices (set pricing_status=confirmed for each offering)
Confirm lesson slot times and daily schedule
Confirm kids Surfpark age rules and guardian-consent policy
Confirm private lesson and large-group lesson prices and capacity limits
Provide hotel name, address, and accommodation package pricing
Wire partner-hotel availability integration or confirm manual-confirm workflow
Populate secret file (handoff phone, Stripe keys, master-admin numbers)
Confirm bad-weather / no-waves lesson refund policy
Confirm refund mechanism (voucher vs cash default)
Flip deployment.enabled=true only after all items above are resolved

portal_demo._note: Staging/demo data only. No real bookings, no real Stripe links. All records scoped to tenant_id=sunset. Remove or gate behind demo_mode=false before go-live.

inbox_threads.email_subject: Rental and lesson enquiry for July
inbox_threads.last_message_preview: We are visiting next month and would like to book a lesson and rent boards for two days.
Do you have boards available for rent this Friday?
Can we pay the deposit by bank transfer instead of card?
